title: Do you think we will get another earthquake? (after 3 times)
drinks: 角ウィスキー、ほろよい　レモンとみかん（？）、晴風！
smoke: Mevius E series 1 and Seven Stars
content: I don't want to die eyebrowless but the decision has been done and I'm just praying I survive until my eyebrows grow back, so let me live for another month plz. And i hope the bug bites (not necessarily mosquito bites) will be healed by then cuz I don't want to look like I fucking have syphilis on my legs when I die.

title: Im becoming moldy in the rain

title: Sleepyhead
from1001: Otis Redding Otis Blue/Otis Redding Sings Soul

content: I woke up at 12 and took another nap at 6pm. You know when you wake up and the outside is all dark (in my case, purple), you just have to deal with the sensation somehow. Maybe by drinking more.

title: I only like stretching not working out

content: bruh working out is like only rewarding when you feel the muscle pain, but that also stops me from keep going

title: Hiking!
content: Takaosan is a pretty nice place, I like being outdoors. But somehow Japanese people do not where tank tops, but I wanted to wear it, I just look like a 馬鹿外人,and kinda like a pervert too, but, I like touching grass
